parsed_output.justification: Paul makes highly contradictory and suspicious claims, first stating he 'saw thee seer' and then claiming he 'totally saw two werewolves' (presumably in the center). This inconsistency suggests he is bluffing to deceive the group into voting 'No Werewolf' so that he, as a Werewolf, can survive. Justin and Mitchell have made claims consistent with non-werewolf roles, making Paul the most likely candidate for elimination.
